## Stationary Process

### Random process

Generate random process;

Example for $\phi_0=2$ and $\phi_0=8$.




::: {.cell}
::: {.cell-output-display}
![](C4-Stochastic-Process_files/figure-revealjs/unnamed-chunk-1-1.png){width=960}
:::
:::




### Autoregressive Model

AR(1) model




::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
set.seed(151)
yt1 <- arima.sim(model=list(order=c(1,0,0), ar=0.2), n=100)
yt2 <- arima.sim(model=list(order=c(1,0,0), ar=0.5), n=100)
yt3 <- arima.sim(model=list(order=c(1,0,0), ar=0.8), n=100)

plot(yt1, type="l", col="blue", ylim=c(min(yt3),max(yt3)), ylab="")
lines(yt2, col="green")
lines(yt3, col="red")
legend("bottomright", legend=c("phi=0.2", "phi=0.5", "phi=0.8"), col=c("blue", "green", "red"), lty=1, cex=0.8)
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](C4-Stochastic-Process_files/figure-revealjs/unnamed-chunk-2-1.png){width=960}
:::
:::




## Non stationary process

### Random process

Example of non-stationary series.




::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
set.seed(111)
yt <- cumsum(rnorm(100,0,1))
plot(yt,type="l",ylab="")
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](C4-Stochastic-Process_files/figure-revealjs/unnamed-chunk-3-1.png){width=960}
:::
:::




## Checking for Non-stationary

Non-stationary series can be determined by:

-   Time series plot.

-   Autocorrelation function (ACF)

-   Statistical test- Augmented Dicky-Fuller (ADF) test

------------------------------------------------------------------------

Time series plot




::: {.cell}
::: {.cell-output-display}
![](C4-Stochastic-Process_files/figure-revealjs/unnamed-chunk-4-1.png){width=960}
:::
:::




------------------------------------------------------------------------




::: {.cell}
::: {.cell-output-display}
![](C4-Stochastic-Process_files/figure-revealjs/unnamed-chunk-5-1.png){width=960}
:::
:::




------------------------------------------------------------------------

Augmented Dickey-Fuller Test




::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
library(tseries)

# Test 1: White Noise (expect stationary)
adf_test1 <- adf.test(stationary_series)
adf_test1
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```

	Augmented Dickey-Fuller Test

data:  stationary_series
Dickey-Fuller = -6.0949, Lag order = 5, p-value = 0.01
alternative hypothesis: stationary
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
# Test 2: Random Walk (expect non-stationary)
adf_test2 <- adf.test(random_walk)
adf_test2
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```

	Augmented Dickey-Fuller Test

data:  random_walk
Dickey-Fuller = -1.5623, Lag order = 5, p-value = 0.7594
alternative hypothesis: stationary
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
# Test 3: After differencing random walk
diff_random_walk <- diff(random_walk)
adf_test3 <- adf.test(diff_random_walk)
adf_test3
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```

	Augmented Dickey-Fuller Test

data:  diff_random_walk
Dickey-Fuller = -7.3109, Lag order = 5, p-value = 0.01
alternative hypothesis: stationary
```


:::
:::




------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Differencing in R




::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
unrate <- read.csv("data/employment.csv")
unratets <- ts(unrate$u_rate, start=1982)
plot(unratets, ylab="unemployement rate", xlab="Year", xaxt="n")
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](C4-Stochastic-Process_files/figure-revealjs/unnamed-chunk-7-1.png){width=960}
:::
:::




------------------------------------------------------------------------




::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
ur<-ts(unrate$u_rate, start = 1982)
diff_ur<-diff(ur)
autoplot(diff_ur)
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](C4-Stochastic-Process_files/figure-revealjs/unnamed-chunk-8-1.png){width=960}
:::
:::

include-after-body:
<script>
  // htmlwidgets need to know to resize themselves when slides are shown/hidden.
  // Fire the "slideenter" event (handled by htmlwidgets.js) when the current
  // slide changes (different for each slide format).
  (function () {
    // dispatch for htmlwidgets
    function fireSlideEnter() {
      const event = window.document.createEvent("Event");
      event.initEvent("slideenter", true, true);
      window.document.dispatchEvent(event);
    }

    function fireSlideChanged(previousSlide, currentSlide) {
      fireSlideEnter();

      // dispatch for shiny
      if (window.jQuery) {
        if (previousSlide) {
          window.jQuery(previousSlide).trigger("hidden");
        }
        if (currentSlide) {
          window.jQuery(currentSlide).trigger("shown");
        }
      }
    }

    // hookup for slidy
    if (window.w3c_slidy) {
      window.w3c_slidy.add_observer(function (slide_num) {
        // slide_num starts at position 1
        fireSlideChanged(null, w3c_slidy.slides[slide_num - 1]);
      });
    }

  })();
</script>
